name: Katala Grand Unified Theory summary
purpose: Durable inf-Brain summary so future sessions preserve the intended meaning of Katala GUT without flattening it into mere implementation scaffolding.

theory_goal.summary: Construct a grand unified theory that contains full relativity and full quantum theory inside a single new descriptive field.
theory_goal.warning: Do not reduce this project to bookkeeping, storage architecture, or mere implementation-layer organization. Those are support systems only.

origin_signal.starting_point: Black-hole formation / causality / gravity inconsistency intuition
origin_signal.methodological_rule: Do not jump directly to physics assertion. First construct Euclid-internal axiomatic candidates, then map into physics.

three_layer_single_model.important: Layers 1-3 are not separate models and not merely sequential stages; together they form one single model.

layer_1.role: Cover and enumerate all Euclidean and non-Euclidean geometries actually used across the full classical relativity domain and the full quantum domain.

layer_2.role: Use IUT rigorously as the hard mediation / mapping / consistency / invariant-management layer.

layer_3.role: Require Einstein-style local/limit recovery to Euclidean geometry.

continuous_dimension.meaning: Dimension is not a fixed integer label only. It should be treated as continuous, locally variable, and recoverable to classical integer dimension in the appropriate limit.
continuous_dimension.non_goal: This is not merely a loose fractional-dimension idea. Continuous dimension is part of the core descriptive field of the unified theory.

implementation_support_layers.note: L/S/P/M/C-style implementation artifacts are support structures around the theory, not the theory itself.

anti_misread_rules: Do not describe the 3-layer model as just a later abstract design convenience.
Do not flatten L1/S1/P1/M1/C1 into one single primary axis.
Do not describe M-layer as a passive storage box only.
Always preserve that the actual target is Katala GUT, not merely a data pipeline.
